name: Multiple Interpretations of UI Input
description: The UI has multiple interpretations of user input but does not prompt the user when it selects the less secure interpretation. Ambiguous input is silently resolved in a way that may compromise security without the user's knowledge or consent.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node (user input) flows to a TRANSFORM node that has multiple interpretation paths. The system selects a less secure interpretation without routing through a CONTROL node that prompts the user for disambiguation or an EGRESS node that warns about the interpretation chosen.
